title: Large Crystal Clear Glass Fruit Bowl, Creative Footed Modern Deep Dish Pudding Trifle Dessert Serving Bowl Ideal Decorative Bowls, Salad and Potpourri 23cm
features: Elegant Design: The Reldor glass fruit bowl intrigues with an unusually sophisticated form that will attract the attention of your guests. Whether for fruit, dry flowers, or potpourri bowls, this bowl is perfect for your drawing room table. It also works wonderfully as a snack or candy bowl, adding an elegant touch to both home and office spaces.

Minimalist Modern Design: This elegant Reldor glass bowl fits seamlessly in both classic and modern interiors. Use it as a salad bowl, fruit bowl, or snack bowl. It’s an ideal decorative bowl, offering both function and beauty. Perfect for serving dishes, it complements any decor style effortlessly.

Bowl Size: The Reldor large bowl, approximately 23cm in diameter and 11cm in height, is ideal for serving large portions of fruit, salad, or snacks. This glass bowl can also function as a decorative piece for potpourri or dry flowers. Whether used as a trifle bowl or serving dish, it is a must-have for your kitchen or table decor.

Functionally Designed: With its large mouth, this Reldor glass bowl offers both beauty and practicality. A three-footed base, this bowl can also be used as a trifle bowl or key bowl. The versatile design makes it a simple yet authentic decorative bowl for any occasion, home, or office.

Best for Table Decor: The Reldor fruit bowl is crafted from high-quality glass with intricate designs that enhance any room's aesthetic. Whether you use it as a large fruit bowl, decorative bowl, or serving bowl, it adds a classic and elegant touch to your home. Looking for a gift? It’s perfect for family, friends, or loved ones.

Perfect Gift Idea: Looking for a thoughtful gift? The Reldor glass bowl makes an exquisite choice for family, friends, or loved ones. Its elegant design and versatile use as a fruit bowl, salad bowl, or decorative piece ensure it will delight anyone. Ideal for special occasions or as a stylish addition to their home decor.
